prose:
**Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied input file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`), not relaxed. SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.6523067 eV, LUMO = −1.7826355 eV → **gap = 5.8696712 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). Integrity status: **OK** (trustworthy). Command: `frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`. Calculation output logged live; result produced by PySCF backend (RKS/DFT).</prose>
